summary:
The issue is in `generate_getter` in `codegen.rs`, specifically in this branch for `FieldType::Ref(type_name)`:
```rust
FieldType::Ref(type_name) => {
    // Ref types: return the nested struct via accessor
    format!(
        "    pub fn {}(&self) -> {} {{\n        &self.{}\n    }}\n\n",
        name, type_name, name
    )
}
```
**Bug:**  
This generates code like `pub fn foo(&self) -> Company { &self.foo }` — i.e., the getter's return type is `Company` (owned) instead of a reference `&Company`.  
But the return expression is `&self.foo`, which is a reference, so the signature should be `-> &Company`.

**How to fix:**  
Change `-> {}` to `-> &{}` in the format string:

```rust
FieldType::Ref(type_name) => {
    // Ref types: return the nested struct via accessor
    format!(
        "    pub fn {}(&self) -> &{} {{\n        &self.{}\n    }}\n\n",
        name, type_name, name
    )
}
```

**Summary:**  
- Change  
  `pub fn {}(&self) -> {} {{\n        &self.{}\n    }}\n\n`  
  to  
  `pub fn {}(&self) -> &{} {{\n        &self.{}\n    }}\n\n`  
  in the `FieldType::Ref(type_name)` arm of `generate_getter`.
  
Would you like me to make this change in `/app/src/codegen.rs` and then run `test.sh` to verify?
